original_image_tags: Document shows faint, faded typing visible from the reverse side of the page, appearing as mirror-image text. The primary content of this page consists of various official "RECEIVED" ink stamps, indicating the routing of the document through the Federal Bureau of Investigation and Department of Justice in July and August of 1949. The paper shows signs of age and has two punch holes at the top. The reverse-side text is illegible in its mirrored state.

elements.description: Multiple blue ink stamps and printed text. Visible stamps include 'RECEIVED FBI' with dates in July and August 1949, 'U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE', 'FLETCHER', 'DIRECTOR', 'NON REQUESTED', and 'RESPONDING'. A faint, barely legible eagle watermark is visible at the top. Two black hole-punches are present at the top edge.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual content of FBI and DOJ ink stamps from 1949 and the presence of two punch holes, but they differ on quoted stamp text and details like a watermark versus mirrored reverse-side text.
